name: mcp-aemps
description: First open-source, regulatory-compliant MCP server for the Spanish AEMPS CIMA pharmaceutical registry (20,000+ authorised medicines).
long_description: Exposes the Spanish AEMPS CIMA REST API as MCP tools, prompts and resources: 21 tools (medicamentos, presentaciones, VMP/VMPP, maestras, registro de cambios, problemas de suministro, notas de seguridad, materiales informativos, fichas técnicas, prospectos), 10 curated prompts for hospital / industria / public, and `cima://` resource templates with autocomplete for nregistro / CN / ATC / principios activos / laboratorios.

log_level.title: Log level
log_level.description: Verbosity of the embedded server logs (DEBUG / INFO / WARNING / ERROR).

redis_url.title: Redis URL (optional)
redis_url.description: If set, mcp-aemps uses Redis for distributed cache + rate limiting. Leave blank for the in-memory default.

mcp_aemps_locale.title: Locale
mcp_aemps_locale.description: Tool descriptions and prompts language: 'es' (default) or 'en'. Auto-detected from OS if unset.
